name: Battell Park
description: Battell Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mishawaka, IN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Boehm Park
description: Boehm Park is a place to play pickleball in United States, IN. There are 8 outdoor courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: As of 7/1/2025, this court is under construction.

name: Central Park
description: Come play pickleball at Central Park in Mishawaka, IN! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Clay Church Firehouse Campus
description: Clay Church Firehouse Campus is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in South Bend, IN. There are 3 indoor carpet courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.

name: H2 Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at H2 Pickleball in Mishawaka, IN! There are 7 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
hours: We are open 24/7... 365 Days per Year ( Weather Permitting ) To speak with someone, call Don at (574) 316-4466. If no answer, please leave your name AND your phone number as the phone system does not identify caller or keep a record of a caller's phone number. Subscribe to our H2 Pickleball mailing list Click here to see our Privacy Policy

name: Harris Township Park at Elm Road
description: Harris Township Park at Elm Road is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Granger, IN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: South Bend Racquet Club
description: South Bend Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Mishawaka, IN. There are 22 indoor acrylic and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, lights, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Non-Members have an additional guest fee when playing on the championship courts.

name: The Beacon Resource Center
description: Portable nets are available but will need to be set up.

name: The Salvation Army Kroc Center
description: There is no indoor Pickleball here in the summer months.
open_play_schedule: There is no indoor Pickleball here in the summer months.
fees: Fee required — $5 reservation, no membership needed

name: Twin Branch Park
description: Twin Branch Park is a place to play pickleball in Mishawaka, IN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
